verses.1: Of Moab. The LORD of Armies, the God of Israel, says:
verses.2: The praise of Moab is no more.
verses.3: The sound of a cry from Horonaim,
verses.5: For they will go up by the ascent of Luhith with continual weeping.
verses.7: For, because you have trusted in your works and in your treasures,
verses.8: The destroyer will come on every city,
verses.10: “Cursed is he who does the work of the LORD negligently;
verses.11: “Moab has been at ease from his youth,
verses.12: Therefore behold, the days come,” says the LORD,
verses.13: Moab will be ashamed of Chemosh,
verses.14: “How do you say, ‘We are mighty men,
verses.16: “The calamity of Moab is near to come,
verses.17: All you who are around him, bemoan him;
verses.19: Inhabitant of Aroer, stand by the way and watch.
verses.21: Judgment has come on the plain country—
verses.22: on Dibon, on Nebo, on Beth Diblathaim,
verses.23: on Kiriathaim, on Beth Gamul, on Beth Meon,
verses.25: The horn of Moab is cut off,
verses.27: For wasn’t Israel a derision to you?
verses.28: You inhabitants of Moab, leave the cities, and dwell in the rock.
verses.29: “We have heard of the pride of Moab.
verses.30: I know his wrath,” says the LORD, “that it is nothing;
verses.31: Therefore I will wail for Moab.
verses.32: With more than the weeping of Jazer
verses.33: Gladness and joy is taken away from the fruitful field
verses.34: From the cry of Heshbon even to Elealeh,
verses.35: Moreover I will cause to cease in Moab,” says the LORD,
verses.36: Therefore my heart sounds for Moab like flutes,
verses.38: On all the housetops of Moab,
verses.40: For the LORD says: “Behold, he will fly as an eagle,
verses.42: Moab will be destroyed from being a people,
verses.43: Terror, the pit, and the snare are on you,
verses.44: “He who flees from the terror will fall into the pit;
verses.45: “Those who fled stand without strength under the shadow of Heshbon;
verses.47: “Yet I will reverse the captivity of Moab in the latter days,”
